title: sagina linnaei
intro: Sagina linnaei, also known as Limestone Pearlwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. The plant is used in herbal medicine, particularly for its expectorant properties, which help to loosen and clear mucus from the respiratory system. The health benefits of Sagina linnaei include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Sagina linnaei typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and stems, which can be consumed as teas or added to other herbal remedies.
